name: Sol Mate SDK Tools
description: Open source Python packages for integrating Sol Mate stake mechanics, reputation, and x402 payments into your app or agent.

packages.name: solmate-stake-sdk
packages.description: StakeGate, StakeRecord, SlashingPolicy — enforce stake-to-interact mechanics

packages.name: solmate-reputation
packages.description: 5-dimension ReputationEngine with decay and Hedera HCS anchoring

packages.name: x402-solana
packages.description: FastAPI middleware for Coinbase x402 HTTP-native USDC payments on Base
